name: Rich Little
bio: Rich Little is a Canadian-American comedian and impressionist nicknamed the Man of a Thousand Voices for his repertoire of more than 200 celebrity and political impersonations. He broke through in the 1960s on The Judy Garland Show and The Ed Sullivan Show, became a fixture of the Dean Martin Celebrity Roasts in the 1970s, and built a long career in television specials and Las Vegas.

timeline.ev: Big break performing impressions on CBS The Judy Garland Show
Named Comedy Star of the Year by the American Guild of Variety Artists
Stars in and voices all roles in Rich Little's Christmas Carol
Inducted into Canada's Walk of Fame

accolades: Comedy Star of the Year, American Guild of Variety Artists (1974)
Officer of the Order of Canada

bits.yt_title: Rich Little's Impressions Remain Undefeated I The Dean Martin Celebrity Roast
